Welcome To ICRA 2026

The Premier Conference in Robotics & Automation

Registration Open

DD days
HH hours
MM mins
SS secs

The ICRA 2026 Congress will take place in the heart of Europe.
Save the date for ICRA in Vienna, Austria already now!

Robots for all

Join Us for the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Robotics & Automation, 1–5 June, Vienna, Austria!

learn more

Check Out the Latest from LinkedIn

Come and meet in Vienna, Austria
on June 1-5 for ICRA 2026!
